/works/skolkovo.title: Skolkovo - ALEXUAL
/works/skolkovo.description: ALEXUAL.COM Product Design Portfolio UI/UX, Web, App
h4:
I have been designing and iteratively improving the UI/UX for specific modules, ensuring accessibility and mobile adaption.
Payment interfaces: Created forms for administrative fees and program purchases, integrating with payment systems. Added seamless payments options, visual security indicators, and error-handling (for example, prompts for incorrect card entry). This reduced errors by 15%.
Administrative Commission interfaces: Design of multistep forms for programs (for example, for an MBA: upload essay, fee payment). Simplified the interface by adding drag-and-drop for documents and integration with the interview calendar. Ensured compliance with GDPR-like rules for data.
Loyalty program interfaces: I have developed a personal account with a dashboard of points, a calculator (showing accrual by level), sections of privileges (access to exclusive events) and promotions (entering promo codes).
During our work, we have launched several iterations of the site, increasing the overall conversion rate by 18% and improving engagement metrics.
p: Create a free website with Framer, the website builder loved by startups, designers and agencies.

/.title: ALEXUAL PRODUCT DESIGNER
/.description: ALEXUAL.COM Product Design Portfolio UI/UX, Web, App
h4: Senior product designer with a career spanning over 10 years of experience in creating products, digital interactions, brands and just fun things that are pleasant to use.

I am creating useful digital products that will improve people's lives and give them satisfaction. Former worked with US and EU based startups & local companies as a part of advertising agency Eberhardt Lindford.

Starting my career I've seen things young designers wouldn't believe. Grunge and web2.0 on the rise at the ugly beginning of 00s. I watched first responsive sites glitter in the dark at the dawn of 10s, and first UX-centric approaches emerging recently. I've seen skeuomorphism die. All those moments will not be lost in time.
Now I'm totally obsessed with AI, Web3, blockchain & tech startups.Let's go build the damn future!
p: Senior product designer with a career spanning over 10 years of experience in creating products, digital interactions, brands and just fun things that are pleasant to use.
Create a free website with Framer, the website builder loved by startups, designers and agencies.
